info.name: Fursa API
info.description:
# Fursa (فرصة) REST API

Professional Postman collection for the Laravel Fursa mobile/API backend. It mirrors the legacy Django backend's URL layout (trailing slashes) and covers **every** route registered in `routes/api.php`.

## Setup
1. Import this collection (and, optionally, an environment that overrides `base_url`).
2. `base_url` defaults to `http://fursa.test/api/` — update it to your local/staging host.
3. Run **01 Auth → Login & Session → Login** with a seeded account (see table below). The response test script stores the bearer `{{token}}` automatically.
4. For OTP-based flows, run **Verify OTP Or Token** after registering — its test script stores `{{token}}` (register) or `{{reset_token}}` (password reset).
5. Organization-only endpoints (Events, etc.) require logging in with the seeded `{{org_email}}` account instead.

## Authentication
Protected endpoints use **Bearer Token** auth via the collection variable `{{token}}`.
Header sent: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` (the API also accepts the legacy `Authorization: Token <key>` header).
Public/no-auth endpoints are explicitly marked `noauth` on the request.

## Body convention
All write requests (`POST` / `PUT` / `PATCH` / `DELETE` with a body) use **multipart/form-data**, matching how the Laravel controllers read `$request->validate()` / `$request->file()`. File fields are marked `type: file` — attach a real file in Postman before sending.

## Response envelope
Every JSON response follows the shared envelope:

```json
{
  "key": "success",
  "msg": "Human readable message (localized by Accept-Language).",
  "code": 200,
  "response_status": { "error": false, "validation_errors": [] },
  "data": { }
}
```

Paginated list endpoints additionally include `meta.pagination` (page, limit, total, total_pages).

## Seeded demo accounts
| Email | Password | Type |
|-------|----------|------|
| volunteer@fursa.local | Password1 | Volunteer |
| organization@fursa.local | Password1 | Organization |

## Folder map
01 Auth · 02 Base & Lookups · 03 FAQ · 04 Volunteer Profile · 05 Organization Profile · 06 Opportunities · 07 Events · 08 Community · 09 Notifications · 10 Calendar · 11 Sponsors · 12 Contact Us · 13 Statistics & Certificates

item.name: 01 Auth
item.description: Registration, login/session, password reset, social auth, and account endpoints.

item.name: Registration
item.description: Create volunteer or organization accounts, and pre-check email/nickname availability.

request.description:
## Register Volunteer
Creates a new volunteer account and triggers activation (OTP email or activation link, based on `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD`).

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Unique account email |
| password | Recommended | Min 8 chars, at least 1 uppercase + 1 digit (e.g. `Password1`) |
| user_type | No | `volunteer` (default) |
| first_name / last_name | No | Name fields |
| phone_number / country_code | No | Contact phone |
| civil_id | Yes (volunteer) | Kuwait civil ID (max 12, unique) |
| nickname | No | Display nickname |
| gender | No | `master_choices.id` for gender |
| nationality | No | Nationality code, e.g. `KW` |
| birth_year / dob | No | Used for age checks — if age < 18, `emergency_contact_*` become required |
| preferred_language | No | `en` or `ar` |
| profile_pic | No | Image file |
| organization_id | No | Optional `organization_profiles.id` to affiliate with |
| emergency_contact_* | Conditional | Required when volunteer age < 18 |

formdata.description: Unique email for the new volunteer account.
Password: min 8 chars, include uppercase letter and a digit.
Account type. Use `volunteer` for this request.
Mobile phone number without country code (max 15).
Kuwait Civil ID (required & unique for volunteers, max 12).
Public nickname on the volunteer profile.
Gender master choice ID (`master_choices.id`). Get IDs from 02 Base & Lookups → Get Choices.
Birth year (integer). Used with/without dob for age checks.
Date of birth `YYYY-MM-DD`. If under 18, emergency contact fields are required.
Guardian civil ID matching `/^[23]\d{11}$/` (required if age < 18).

request.description:
## Register Organization (Entity)
Creates a new organization/entity account. Profile stays pending until admin approval.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Unique email |
| password | Recommended | Strong password rule |
| user_type | Yes | Must be `organization` |
| company_name | Recommended | Entity display name |
| nickname | No | Entity nickname |
| organizer_type | No | `master_choices.id` |
| registration_number / license_number | No | Official numbers |
| documents[] | No | Supporting document files |
| latitude / longitude | No | Map coordinates |
| profile_pic | No | Logo/avatar image |

formdata.description: Unique email for the organization account.
Contact first name on the user record.
Contact last name on the user record.
Short nickname for the entity profile.
Organization supporting document file (repeat key for multiple).

request.description:
## Check User
Checks whether an email and/or nickname is already taken (used for signup live validation). Provide at least one of `email` or `nickname`.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | One of | Email availability check |
| nickname | One of | Nickname availability across volunteer/org profiles |

formdata.description: Email to check for existing registration.
Nickname to check across volunteer/organization profiles.

item.name: Login & Session
item.description: Login and the authenticated account read/update endpoints.

request.description:
## Login
Authenticates with email/password and returns `auth_token`.

**Token path in response:** `data.data.auth_token`. A test script saves it into the collection variable `{{token}}` automatically.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Registered account email |
| password | Yes | Account password |
| rememberMe | No | `true`/`1` extends token lifetime (~30d vs ~1d) |
| is_opportunity | No | When true, restricts login to volunteer accounts |

formdata.description: Account email. Default seeded volunteer: volunteer@fursa.local.
Account password. Seeded demo password: Password1.
Pass 1/true for a longer-lived auth token.
Pass 1/true to allow only volunteer users to log in.

exec: } catch (e) { console.log('No JSON body to parse for token'); }

request.description:
## Get Account
Returns the authenticated user's account payload (profile fields, badge, interests).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

## Update Account
Updates account fields for the authenticated user. Supports profile image upload via form-data. `PATCH` is also accepted.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| profile_pic | No | New avatar image file |
| first_name / last_name | No | Name fields |
| email | No | New unique email |
| phone_number / country_code | No | Phone |
| birth_year / nationality / preferred_language | No | Profile meta |
| civil_id | No | Unique civil ID |
| emergency_contact_* | No | Emergency contact block |

item.name: Password Reset
item.description: Forgot-password OTP/link flow, verification, resend, and password change.

request.description:
## Forgot Password
Starts the password reset flow (sends OTP or reset link depending on `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD`).

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Account email that will receive the reset OTP/link |

formdata.description: Registered user email to receive the password reset OTP/link.

request.description:
## Verify OTP Or Token
Verifies an OTP for `register` or `password` flows (only active when `AUTHENTICATION_METHOD=OTP`).

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Account email |
| type | Yes | `register` or `password` |
| otp | Yes | OTP code from email |

### Response tokens
- `type=register` → `data.token` is the API auth key (saved to `{{token}}`).
- `type=password` → `data.token` is the reset token (saved to `{{reset_token}}`).

exec: console.log('Saved auth {{token}} from register OTP verify');

request.description:
## Resend OTP Or Token
Resends the activation or password-reset OTP/link.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Target account email |
| type | Yes | `register` or `password` |

formdata.description: Account email to resend OTP/link to.

request.description:
## Change Password
Sets a new password using either a reset `token` (from Forgot Password → Verify OTP) **or** `old_password`.

**Auth:** Public (no auth) — identity is proven via token or old password.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Account email |
| password | Yes | New password (min 8, uppercase + digit) |
| token | Conditional | Reset token from Verify OTP (`type=password`) |
| old_password | Conditional | Current password if changing without a reset token |

formdata.description: New password (min 8, must include uppercase + digit).
Current password if not using a reset token.

item.name: Social Auth
item.description: Google/LinkedIn social login and LinkedIn OAuth code exchange.

request.description:
## Social Auth
Logs in or registers via a social provider payload (Google/LinkedIn). Returns `auth_token` at `data.auth_token` (the shared test script also stores `{{token}}` when present).

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| email | Yes | Social account email |
| social_media_provider | Yes | `google` or `linkedin` |
| social_media_id | No | Provider user id |
| first_name / last_name | No | Name from provider |
| social_profile_pic_url | No | Avatar URL |
| user_type | No | Defaults to `volunteer` for new users |
| civil_id | Yes for new volunteer | Civil ID |
| nickname / company_name | No | Profile fields |

formdata.description: Email returned by the social provider.
Unique user id from the social provider.
Used when creating a new user.
Required when creating a new volunteer via social auth.
Optional nickname for the new profile.
Optional company name for organization social signup.

exec: } catch (e) { console.log('No JSON body to parse for token'); }

request.description:
## LinkedIn Callback
Exchanges a LinkedIn OAuth `code` for the LinkedIn profile + LinkedIn `access_token` (not the Fursa API token — pass the profile fields to Social Auth next).

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| code | Yes | LinkedIn OAuth authorization code |
| redirect_uri | Yes | Exact redirect URI used in the authorize step |

formdata.description: Authorization code returned by the LinkedIn OAuth redirect.
Must match the redirect_uri configured in the LinkedIn app + authorize URL.

item.name: Account
item.description: Public profile lookup by numeric user id.

request.description:
## Public Profile
Returns a public user profile (volunteer or organization) by numeric user id, including badge and interests.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| userId | Target `users.id` (collection var `{{user_id}}`) |

item.name: 02 Base & Lookups
item.description: Master-choice lookups, banner images/platform stats, image proxy, license checks, and combined profile discovery.

request.description:
## Get Choices
Returns master choice options for a given choice-type slug/name (e.g. gender, nationality, org_type).

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| choiceType | Choice type key (collection var `{{choice_type}}`, e.g. `gender`, `org_type`) |

## Banner Images
Public list of homepage banner images plus platform statistics (volunteer/organization/team counts).

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

## Proxy Image
Proxies a remote image URL or a storage-relative path for CORS-friendly delivery. Returns raw image bytes.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| url | One of | Absolute remote image URL to fetch and proxy |
| key | One of | Relative path on the `public` disk |
| path | Alias | Same as `key` |

## Proxy Image (CORS Preflight)
OPTIONS preflight for the image proxy endpoint. Returns CORS headers only, no body.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

## Check License Requirement
Returns whether the authenticated user's role (`volunteer`, `organization`, or `volunteer_team`) requires uploading a license document.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

query.description: Search term across nickname/first/last name (all buckets).
Restrict results to one bucket: volunteer, organization, or volunteer_team.
Default page number applied to all buckets unless overridden.
Page number override for the volunteer bucket.
Page number override for the organization bucket.
Page number override for the volunteer_team bucket.

request.description:
## All Profiles
Combined public discovery endpoint returning three independently paginated buckets: `volunteer`, `organization`, and `volunteer_team` profiles — useful for a unified directory/search screen.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| search | No | Matches nickname or first/last name across all buckets |
| name | No | Matches first/last name only |
| nickname | No | Matches nickname only |
| user_type | No | Restrict to one bucket: `volunteer`, `organization`, or `volunteer_team` |
| page | No | Shared default page number for all buckets |
| volunteer_page / organization_page / volunteer_team_page | No | Per-bucket page override |
| limit | No | Results per page per bucket (1-100, default 10) |

item.name: 03 FAQ
item.description: Frequently asked questions.

request.description:
## List FAQs
Paginated public FAQ list (bilingual question/answer).

item.name: 04 Volunteer Profile
item.description: The authenticated volunteer's own profile, directory search, QR code, and public UUID verification.

request.description:
## Get Volunteer Profile
Returns the authenticated volunteer's profile (gender, badge, interests).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

## Update Volunteer Profile
Updates volunteer profile fields and optionally syncs interests. `PATCH` is also accepted.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| civil_id | Yes | Civil ID |
| nickname / occupation / experience | No | Profile text |
| health_concerns | No | `yes` or `no` |
| is_public / is_verified | No | Booleans as `1`/`0` |
| gender | No | master_choices.id |
| email / nationality / dob / birth_year | No | User fields |
| *_link | No | Social URLs |
| interest_ids[0..] | No | Interest IDs to sync |

formdata.description: Required civil ID for the volunteer profile update.
Verified flag (`1`/`0`) — usually managed by system/admin.
First interest id to sync (from the interests table).

request.description:
## Get Volunteer QR Code
Returns the QR code URL and manual ID used for attendance scanning/verification.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

## List All Volunteers
Searchable/paginated directory of verified, non-banned volunteers.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| search | No | Search nickname/name/email |
| page | No | Page number |
| limit | No | Page size 1-100 (default 20) |

## Verify Volunteer By UUID
Public verification endpoint using the volunteer profile UUID (e.g. scanned from a printed badge/QR code).

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| uuid | Volunteer profile UUID (`{{volunteer_uuid}}`) |

Replace `{{volunteer_uuid}}` with a real UUID from a volunteer profile / QR payload.

item.name: 05 Organization Profile
item.description: The authenticated organization's own profile, supporting documents, and org directory listing.

request.description:
## Get Organization Profile
Returns the authenticated organization's profile (sector, organizer type, documents).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`. Log in with `{{org_email}}` / `{{password}}` first.

## Update Organization Profile
Updates entity profile fields and social links. `PATCH` is also accepted.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| nickname / company_name | No | Identity |
| sector / organizer_type | No | master_choices IDs |
| registration_number / license_number | No | Legal numbers |
| latitude / longitude | No | Location |
| nationality | No | On linked user |
| *_link | No | Social URLs |

## Update Organization Documents
Syncs organization documents: keep IDs listed in `existing_ids[]`, upload new files via `new_documents[]`. Any existing document not listed in `existing_ids` is soft-deleted.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| existing_ids[0..] | No | Document IDs to keep |
| new_documents[] | No | New files to upload |

formdata.description: Another existing document id to keep (optional).
New document file to upload (attach file in Postman).

request.description:
## List Organizations
Paginated list of approved organizations (excludes the current user).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| name | No | Filter by company name / nickname |
| page | No | Page number |
| limit | No | Page size 1-100 |

item.name: 06 Opportunities
item.description: Volunteer opportunities and Learn & Serve opportunities: public discovery, CRUD, registrations, roles/teams, time slots, attendance, feedback, media, and deletion workflow.

item.name: Public Lists
item.description: Public discovery endpoints for volunteer and learn & serve opportunities (no create/update here).

query.description: filter-type master_choices.id — only Volunteer type opportunities are returned.
Only opportunities starting on/after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Only opportunities ending on/before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Interest name filter (repeat key for multiple tags).
true to restrict to the caller's interests (requires auth).

request.description:
## List Volunteer Opportunities (Public)
Searchable/filterable/sorted public feed of approved, public volunteer opportunities. Urgent + open opportunities are boosted to the top.

**Auth:** Public (no auth) — pass a bearer token to enable `match_my_interest`.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| search | No | Matches title (en/ar) |
| type | No | `master_choices.id` under `filter-type` choice type — only `Volunteer` type passes |
| start_date / end_date | No | Filter by opportunity date range |
| min_hours / max_hours | No | Filter by `volunteer_hours_per_day` |
| tags[] | No | Interest name filters |
| location | No | Location text filter |
| gender | No | `master_choices.id` or `all` |
| min_age / max_age | No | Age range filters |
| opportunity_nationality | No | `kuwaitis` or `non-kuwaitis` |
| is_relief / is_urgent / is_supports_disabled | No | Boolean flags |
| match_my_interest | No | `true` to restrict to the caller's interests (requires auth) |
| status | No | `upcoming`, `inprogress`, or `completed` |
| page / limit | No | Pagination |

## Opportunity Details
Returns full details for a single volunteer opportunity, including roles and teams. Non-approved opportunities are only visible to their creator.

**Auth:** Public (no auth), pass a bearer token to view your own pending opportunity.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| opportunity_id | `volunteer_opportunities.id` |

query.description: View opportunities for another user id (implies public/approved-only).

request.description:
## List All Opportunities (Combined)
Combines Volunteer, Learn & Serve, and Event listings into a single sorted feed (upcoming → in-progress → completed).

**Auth:** Public (no auth); pass a bearer token or `user_id` to scope `filter_type`.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| user_id | No | View another user's opportunities (implies only approved/public items) |
| filter_type | No | `organized`, `volunteer`, or `attendee` |
| opportunity_type | No | `volunteer`, `learn`, or `event` |
| search | No | Title search (en/ar) |
| status | No | opportunity_status / event_status |
| page / limit | No | Pagination |

query.description: View opportunities for another user id.

request.description:
## List User Opportunities
Combines Volunteer + Learn & Serve opportunities for the caller (or `user_id`), filterable by registered/organized and completion status.

**Auth:** Public (no auth) if `user_id` is supplied; otherwise requires a bearer token.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| user_id | No | View another user's opportunities |
| filter_type | No | `registered` or `organized` |
| opportunity_type | No | `volunteer` or `learn` |
| search | No | Title search (en/ar) |
| opportunity_status | No | upcoming/inprogress/completed |

query.description: true to restrict to IN PERSON format.
true to restrict to ONLINE format.

request.description:
## List Learn & Serve Opportunities (Public)
Public/approved (or own pending) list of Learn & Serve opportunities.

**Auth:** Public (no auth); pass a bearer token to also see your own pending opportunities.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| search | No | Title search (en/ar) |
| type | No | filter-type master_choices.id — excludes Volunteer-type results |
| in_person / online | No | Filter by `format_id` (IN PERSON / ONLINE) |
| status | No | opportunity_status |
| page / limit | No | Pagination |

## Get Learn & Serve Opportunity
Returns a single Learn & Serve opportunity with interests, images, and time slots.

**Auth:** Public (no auth) for approved opportunities; pass a bearer token to view your own pending opportunity.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `learn_serve_opportunities.id` (collection var `{{opportunity_id}}`) |

item.name: Volunteer Opportunities CRUD
item.description: Create/manage volunteer opportunities you created (organization/organizer account).

request.description:
## List My Volunteer Opportunities
Paginated list of volunteer opportunities created by the authenticated user.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| page / limit | No | Pagination |

## Create Volunteer Opportunity
Creates a new volunteer opportunity in `pending` approval status.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| title_en / title_ar | Yes | Bilingual title |
| description_en / description_ar | Yes | Bilingual description |
| start_date / end_date | Yes | Opportunity date range |
| due_date | No | Registration cutoff |
| participants_needed | Yes | Minimum 1 |
| from_age / to_age | No | Eligible age range |
| start_time / end_time | No | Daily time window |
| latitude / longitude | No | Map location |
| link | No | External URL |
| location_en / location_ar | No | Bilingual location text |
| is_public / is_kuwaitis / is_relief / is_urgent / is_supports_disabled / is_interview_needed | No | Boolean flags |
| volunteer_hours_per_day | No | Numeric |
| gender_id | No | master_choices.id |
| primary_language | No | `en` or `ar` |
| interest_ids[] | No | Interest IDs to attach |

formdata.value: Join us for a community beach cleanup.

formdata.description: Marks this as a relief opportunity (1/0).
Primary display language: en or ar.

request.description:
## Get My Volunteer Opportunity
Returns a volunteer opportunity you created, including roles and teams.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `volunteer_opportunities.id` (collection var `{{opportunity_id}}`) |

## Update Volunteer Opportunity
Partially or fully updates a volunteer opportunity you created. `PATCH` is also accepted; all fields are optional (`sometimes`).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `volunteer_opportunities.id` (collection var `{{opportunity_id}}`) |

### Form-data fields
Same fields as Create (all optional on update) — see Create Volunteer Opportunity for full field docs.

## Update Volunteer Opportunity Images
Uploads new opportunity images (after-completion gallery) and/or re-attaches existing images by id. Only the opportunity creator may call this.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `volunteer_opportunities.id` (collection var `{{opportunity_id}}`) |

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| new_opportunity_images_0..n | No | New image files (any key starting with `opportunity_images_` or `new_opportunity_images_`) |
| existing_image_ids[] | No | `opportunity_images.id` values to re-attach to this opportunity |

formdata.description: New opportunity image file to upload.

request.description:
## Delete Volunteer Opportunity
Soft-deletes a volunteer opportunity you created (sets `is_deleted`/`deleted_at`).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `volunteer_opportunities.id` (collection var `{{opportunity_id}}`) |

item.name: Learn & Serve CRUD
item.description: Create/manage Learn & Serve opportunities you created.

request.description:
## My Learn & Serve Opportunities
Paginated list of Learn & Serve opportunities created by the authenticated user, with registrations and sponsor images eager-loaded.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| page / limit | No | Pagination |

## Create Learn & Serve Opportunity
Creates a new Learn & Serve opportunity in `pending` approval status.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| title_en / title_ar | Yes | Bilingual title |
| description_en / description_ar | Yes | Bilingual description |
| start_date / end_date | Yes | Date range |
| due_date | No | Registration cutoff |
| participants_needed | Yes | Minimum 1 |
| from_age / to_age | No | Eligible age range |
| start_time / end_time | No | Daily time window |
| latitude / longitude | No | Map location |
| link | No | External URL |
| location_en / location_ar | No | Bilingual location text |
| is_kuwaitis | No | Boolean flag |
| learning_type_id / gender_id / format_id / certificate_type_id | No | master_choices IDs |
| primary_language | No | `en` or `ar` |
| interest_ids[] | No | Interest IDs to attach |

formdata.value: Learn essential first-aid skills while volunteering.
تعلم مهارات الإسعافات الأولية الأساسية أثناء التطوع.

formdata.description: Maximum eligible age (leave blank for no cap).
Primary display language: en or ar.

request.description:
## Update Learn & Serve Opportunity
Partially or fully updates a Learn & Serve opportunity you created. `PATCH` is also accepted; all fields are optional on update.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|

## Scan Attendance
Records attendance for one or more volunteers by scanning their QR (UUID). Provide exactly one of `opportunity_id`/`event_id`, and one of `volunteer_uuid`/`volunteer_ids[]`.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}` — caller must be the opportunity creator or have an active scan permission.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| opportunity_id | One of | `volunteer_opportunities.id` (event attendance is not yet implemented) |
| event_id | One of | `events.id` (currently returns 501 Not Implemented) |
| volunteer_uuid | One of | Single volunteer profile UUID scanned |
| volunteer_ids[] | One of | Batch of volunteer profile UUIDs |
| attendance_date | No | Defaults to today; must fall within the opportunity's date range |

formdata.description: events.id (event attendance not yet implemented — returns 501).
Single volunteer profile UUID scanned from the QR code.
Batch of volunteer profile UUIDs (alternative to volunteer_uuid).

Convenience alias that registers the authenticated user for the given event id (internally forwards to Event Registrations → Register For Event).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `events.id` (collection var `{{event_id}}`) |

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| time_slot_id | No | `event_time_slots.id` to register into |

formdata.description: Optional event time slot id to register into.

item.name: Registrations
item.description: Attendee sign-up for events, plus organizer management of registrations.

query.description: registration_date, name, email, status, attendance, or payment.

request.description:
## List Registrations
For organizations: all registrations across their events. For attendees: only their own registrations. Supports search/sort/filter.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| event_id / event | No | Filter by event |
| status | No | registration_status |
| payment_status | No | Payment status |
| is_attended | No | Boolean attendance filter |
| search | No | Search registrant name/email/phone |
| sort_by | No | `registration_date`, `name`, `email`, `status`, `attendance`, `payment` |
| sort_order | No | `asc` or `desc` (default desc) |
| page / limit | No | Pagination |

## My Registrations
Paginated list of the authenticated user's own event registrations.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| status | No | Filter by registration_status |
| time | No | `upcoming` or `past` |
| page / limit | No | Pagination |

## Register For Event
Registers the authenticated user for an event (checks due date, duplicate registration, and remaining capacity).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| event | Yes | `events.id` |
| time_slot_id | No | `event_time_slots.id` belonging to the event |

formdata.description: Optional event time slot id to register into.

request.description:
## List Registrations By Event
Organizer-only view of every registration for a specific event (accepts the same filters as List Registrations).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}` with the owning organization account.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| event_id | `events.id` (collection var `{{event_id}}`) |

## Get Registration
Returns a single event registration with user, event, and time slot.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `event_registrations.id` (collection var `{{registration_id}}`) |

## List Registrations For Event (Alias)
Alias of List Registrations By Event, addressed by the event id in this path segment (kept for parity with the legacy API shape).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}` with the owning organization account.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `events.id` (collection var `{{registration_id}}` — reuse as an event id here) |

## Update Registration
Organizer-only update of a registration's status/payment/attendance/time slot. `PATCH` is also accepted.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}` with the owning organization account.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `event_registrations.id` (collection var `{{registration_id}}`) |

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| registration_status (or status) | No | New registration status |
| payment_status | No | New payment status |
| is_attended | No | Boolean attendance flag |
| time_slot_id | No | Reassign to a different time slot |

formdata.description: New registration status (accepts `status` as an alias key too).
Reassign to a different event time slot.

request.description:
## Cancel Registration
Cancels a registration (soft-delete). Allowed for the event organizer or the registrant themself.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `event_registrations.id` (collection var `{{registration_id}}`) |

## Unregister From Event
Cancels the authenticated user's own registration for an event (hard delete). Both `POST` and `DELETE` are accepted.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| event_id | `events.id` (collection var `{{event_id}}`) |

item.name: Time Slots
item.description: Date/time slots with a participant cap for events.

request.description:
## List Event Time Slots
Returns time slots for an event that still have remaining capacity, plus overall remaining participants in `meta`.

**Auth:** Public (no auth) at the controller level, though most callers will be authenticated organizers.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| event_id | Yes | `events.id` |
| date | No | Filter to a specific date |

## Get Event Time Slot
Returns a single event time slot plus remaining participants in `meta`.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `event_time_slots.id` (collection var `{{time_slot_id}}`) |

## Create Event Time Slot
Adds a date/time slot with a participant cap to an event you own.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}` with the owning organization account.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| event | Yes | `events.id` you own |
| date | Yes | Slot date `YYYY-MM-DD` |
| start_time / end_time | Yes | Time window |
| participants_needed | Yes | Minimum 1 |

## Update Event Time Slot
Updates a time slot for an event you own. `PATCH` is also accepted.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}` with the owning organization account.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `event_time_slots.id` (collection var `{{time_slot_id}}`) |

### Form-data fields
Same fields as Create (all optional).

## Delete Event Time Slot
Soft-deletes a time slot for an event you own.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}` with the owning organization account.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `event_time_slots.id` (collection var `{{time_slot_id}}`) |

item.name: Deletion
item.description: Organizer-initiated event deletion requests and admin approval/rejection.

request.description:
## Request Event Deletion
Submits a deletion request for an event you own; blocked within 7 days of the event's due date, and while another request is already pending.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}` with the owning organization account.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| event_id | `events.id` (collection var `{{event_id}}`) |

## Admin Event Deletion Action
Approves (soft-deletes) or rejects a pending event deletion request. Staff/superuser only.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}` with a staff/superuser account.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| event_id | Yes | `events.id` with a pending deletion request |
| action | Yes | `approve` or `reject` |
| rejection_reason | No | Shown to the organizer when rejecting |

formdata.description: events.id with a pending deletion request.
Optional reason shown to the organizer when rejecting.

item.name: 08 Community
item.description: Community posts/ideas, threaded replies, likes, and @mention suggestions.

item.name: Posts
item.description: Community posts/ideas, with tag browsing and creator contact.

query.description: Only posts created on/after this date.
Only posts created on/before this date.

request.description:
## List Posts
Paginated, filterable feed of visible community posts (with nested top-level replies preloaded).

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| title_en / title_ar | No | Title filters |
| start_date / end_date | No | Created-at date range |
| user | No | Filter by author username/first/last name |
| proposing_idea | No | `true` for idea posts (excludes funding-required) |
| is_funding_required | No | `true` for funding-required posts |
| post | No | `true` for plain posts (excludes ideas/funding) |
| search | No | Search title/idea text (en/ar) |
| tags[] / tag | No | Filter by community tag name |
| page / limit | No | Pagination |

## Get Post
Returns a single visible post with images, tags, and nested replies.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `posts.id` (collection var `{{post_id}}`) |

## All Tags
Returns every community tag that has at least one visible post attached to it.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

query.description: Community tag name to filter posts by.

request.description:
## Posts By Tag
Shortcut for List Posts filtered to a single tag name.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| tag | Yes | Community tag name |

## Create Post
Creates a community post/idea. Automatically hidden (`is_displayed=false`) if forbidden words are detected in the title/text.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| title_en / title_ar | No | Bilingual title |
| idea_text_en / idea_text_ar | No | Bilingual body text — supports `@username` mentions |
| primary_language | No | `en` or `ar` |
| proposing_idea | No | Boolean — marks this as an idea proposal |
| needs_support | No | Boolean |
| is_funding_required | No | Boolean — marks this as a funding request |
| tags[] | No | Tag names (created if new) |
| images[] | No | Post image files |

formdata.value: We need help distributing food packages. cc @ahmed_vol
نحتاج مساعدة في توزيع الطرود الغذائية.

formdata.description: true if this post proposes a new idea.
true if this post is asking for support/help.
true if this post is a funding request.
Tag name to attach (created automatically if new).
Post image file (repeat key for multiple).

request.description:
## Update Post
Updates your own post. `PATCH` is also accepted. Re-runs the forbidden-word check on the merged title/text.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `posts.id` (collection var `{{post_id}}`) |

### Form-data fields
Same fields as Create Post (all optional).

formdata.description: Additional post image file (repeat key for multiple).

request.description:
## Delete Post
Soft-deletes your own post and cascades a soft-delete to its replies.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `posts.id` (collection var `{{post_id}}`) |

## Contact Post Creator
Sends a message to the post's creator (delivery handled asynchronously server-side).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `posts.id` (collection var `{{post_id}}`) |

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| message | Yes | Message text to send to the post creator |

formdata.description: Message text to send to the post creator.
formdata.value: Hi! I'd like to help with this — how can I get involved?

item.name: Replies
item.description: Threaded replies (with nested children) on community posts.

request.description:
## List Replies
Paginated top-level replies for a post (each including its nested child replies).

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| post_id | No | Filter by `posts.id` |
| page / limit | No | Pagination |

## Get Reply
Returns a single visible reply with its children.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `replies.id` (collection var `{{reply_id}}`) |

## Create Reply
Adds a reply to a post, optionally nested under a parent reply. Requires text and/or images. Supports `@username` mentions.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| post | Yes | `posts.id` |
| parent | No | `replies.id` to nest under (must belong to the same post) |
| text_en / text_ar | Conditional | At least one of text/images required |
| primary_language | No | `en` or `ar` |
| images[] | Conditional | Reply image files |

formdata.description: Optional replies.id to nest this reply under (same post).
English reply text (text and/or images required).
Reply image file (repeat key for multiple).

request.description:

Updates your own reply text and/or appends new images. `PATCH` is also accepted.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| id | `replies.id` (collection var `{{reply_id}}`) |

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| text_en / text_ar | Conditional | Updated bilingual text |
| images[] | No | Additional image files |

formdata.description: Additional reply image file (repeat key for multiple).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params

request.description:

Toggles the authenticated user's like on a post or a reply (provide exactly one of `post_id` / `reply_id`).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| post_id | One of | `posts.id` to like/unlike |
| reply_id | One of | `replies.id` to like/unlike |

formdata.description: posts.id to like/unlike (provide this or reply_id, not both).

item.name: 09 Notifications
item.description: The authenticated user's notifications: list/unread-count, mark read/unread, and delete.

query.description: true or false to filter by read state.
Page number (omit both page and limit for the full unpaginated list).

request.description:
## List Notifications
Returns the authenticated user's notifications with an `unread_count`. Omit `page`/`limit` to receive the full unpaginated list; include either to get a paginated response.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| is_read | No | `true` or `false` to filter by read state |
| page / limit | No | Pagination (omit both for the full list) |

## Mark Notifications Read/Unread
Marks specific notifications, or all of them, as read or unread. Provide exactly one of `notification_ids[]` / `mark_all`.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| notification_ids[] | One of | Specific `user_notifications.id` values |
| mark_all | One of | `true` to affect every notification |
| is_read | Yes | `true` to mark read, `false` to mark unread |

formdata.description: user_notifications.id to mark (provide this or mark_all).
true to mark every notification (alternative to notification_ids[]).
true to mark read, false to mark unread.

request.description:
## Delete Notifications
Soft-deletes specific notifications, or all of them. Provide exactly one of `notification_ids[]` / `delete_all`.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| notification_ids[] | One of | Specific `user_notifications.id` values |
| delete_all | One of | `true` to delete every notification |

formdata.description: user_notifications.id to delete (provide this or delete_all).
true to delete every notification (alternative to notification_ids[]).

item.name: 10 Calendar
item.description: The authenticated user's saved/registered/organized items (volunteer, learn & serve, event), plus ICS import.

query.description: Restrict the saved bucket to this flag.
day, week, month, or year (used if start/end not given).
Anchor date for time_range (defaults to today).

request.description:
## List My Calendar Items
Combines saved bookmarks, registered items, and organized items (volunteer opportunities, learn & serve opportunities, and events) into one list.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| item_type | No | `volunteer_opportunity`, `learn_serve_opportunity`, or `event` |
| is_saved | No | Restricts the *saved* bucket to this flag (default true) |
| search | No | Title search (en/ar) |
| start_date / end_date | No | Explicit date range filter |
| time_range | No | `day`, `week`, `month`, or `year` (used if start/end not given) |
| date | No | Anchor date for `time_range` (defaults to today) |

## Save Calendar Item
Bookmarks exactly one of a volunteer opportunity, learn & serve opportunity, or event to the calendar.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| volunteer_opportunity_id | One of | `volunteer_opportunities.id` |
| learn_serve_opportunity_id | One of | `learn_serve_opportunities.id` |
| event_id | One of | `events.id` |
| is_saved | No | Defaults to `true` |

formdata.description: volunteer_opportunities.id to save (exactly one of the three ids is required).
Save state to set (defaults to true).

request.description:

Toggles the `is_saved` flag on your own calendar entry. `PATCH` is also accepted.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params

| id | `my_calendars.id` (reuse `{{time_slot_id}}` as a generic numeric id placeholder) |

### Form-data fields

| is_saved | No | `true`/`false` |

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Path params

|-------|-------------|
| id | `my_calendars.id` (reuse `{{time_slot_id}}` as a generic numeric id placeholder) |

## Upload ICS File
Uploads an `.ics` calendar file and returns its public URL plus a `webcal://` URL for one-tap calendar subscription.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Form-data fields
| Field | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| ics_file | Yes | `.ics` file to upload |

item.name: 13 Statistics & Certificates
item.description: Platform-wide and per-volunteer statistics, leaderboards, certificates, and QR downloads.

request.description:
## Volunteer Hours Statistics
Returns yearly volunteer-hours totals (current year + next 6), grand total, and completed-opportunity counters.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

## Top Volunteers
Returns the current year's top 10 individual volunteers and top 10 volunteer teams, each with badge info.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

## User Certificates
Returns every certified Learn & Serve certificate image for a given user.

**Auth:** Public (no auth).

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| user_id | Yes | `users.id` whose certificates to return |

## Available Volunteers
Lists verified volunteers eligible to be directly registered for a specific opportunity you created (excludes already-registered and, for volunteer opportunities, date-conflicting volunteers).

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}` — caller must own the opportunity.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| opportunity_id | Yes | Target opportunity id |
| type | Yes | `volunteer` or `learnserve` |
| search | No | Search nickname/email/first/last name/civil id |
| page / limit | No | Pagination |

query.description: true to request a PDF export (currently a stub response).

## Volunteer Detail (Self)
Returns the authenticated volunteer's profile summary, current-year statistics, and recent registrations. Volunteers only.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| download | No | `true` requests a PDF export (stub — not yet implemented) |

query.description: volunteer_profiles.id to download the QR code for (required).

## Download Volunteer QR Code
Downloads the stored QR code image file for a volunteer profile.

**Auth:** Public (no auth) at the route level.

### Query params
| Param | Required | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| volunteer_id | Yes | `volunteer_profiles.id` |

## Sync My Statistics
Recomputes and stores the authenticated volunteer's current-month statistics and profile totals from attendance data.

**Auth required:** Bearer `{{token}}`.
